games.title: Nova Lands
games.description: Nova Lands is a factory building, exploration, and island management game. Explore, engage in combat, and automate your industry. The planet you’re on is full of mysteries, creatures, people, and things to do. Welcome to your new home amongst the stars!

games.title: Eternal Threads
games.description: Eternal Threads is a single-player, first-person story-driven puzzle game of time manipulation, choice and consequence.

games.title: Ghostrunner 2
games.description: Ghostrunner 2 is a hardcore FPP slasher set in a post-apocalyptic, cyberpunk world. Featuring everything fans loved about Ghostrunner plus incredible boss fights, new interactive story, thrilling motorbike levels, improved skills, and more cyber ninja action.

games.title: LISA: The Definitive Edition
games.description: Explore Olathe and unmask its twisted secrets with LISA: The Definitive Edition, including the original narrative-driven RPG LISA: The Painful and its sequel LISA: The Joyful.

games.title: Castlevania Anniversary Collection
games.description: Konami's Castlevania Anniversary Collection traces the origins of the historic vampire franchise. Included is a unique eBook with details provided by developers, artists and others inspired by the Castlevania legacy which sheds a fresh light into the world of Castlevania.

games.title: River City Girls 2
games.description: A pixel-art sci-fi adventure set in the midst of a rebellion against a totalitarian regime, LUNARK is a modern take on the 2D cinematic platformer genre of the '90s. Run, jump, hang, climb, roll, and shoot your way through gorgeous and mysterious locations!

games.title: Tattoo Tycoon
games.description: Become a tattoo artist and manage your very own tattoo parlor. Find the best designs for your clients, turning their vague ideas into stunning works of body art. Expand from a cozy personal studio into a thriving multi-parlor business across the diverse districts of Tattuga Bay.

games.title: I Have No Mouth, and I Must Scream
games.description: The Allied Mastercomputer has destroyed all of humanity except for five people, whom it has been keeping them alive and torturing them for the past one hundred and nine years by designing virtual adventures based on their fears and weaknesses.

games.title: Silence
games.description: By clicking the ‘Add to library’ button, I agree to receive marketing communications from GOG on my email address and through GOG services and GOG’s Trusted Partners’ services, to get Silence. See our Privacy policy.

games.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III – Cross-Gen Bundle
games.description: Call of Duty returns with an all-new campaign, modernized versions of classic Multiplayer maps and an open-world PvE Zombies experience. The campaign, a direct sequel to the record-breaking Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II, sees Captain Price and Task Force 141 face off against ultranationalist war criminal Vladimir Makarov as he extends his grasp across the world. In Multiplayer, the 16 maps that launched with Modern Warfare 2 in 2009 return with upgraded graphics, new modes and innovative gameplay features. In Modern Warfare Zombies, team up with other squads for the first time ever as you work together to survive in the largest Zombies map yet.

games.title: For the King II
games.description: Once beloved by her people, Queen Rosomon has turned against her subjects, casting them into servitude in the darkness of Fahrul’s mines whilst building alliances with sinister and malevolent forces. Gather your party in four player co-op or adventure alone through Fahrul as you risk everything to fight the tyrannical queen and bring an end to her oppressive reign. From the creators of For The King, the much-loved RPG that blends roguelite and tabletop gameplay comes a new chapter in Fahrul’s history, designed on an updated engine bringing innovation and gameplay refinement for returning heroes and new adventurers alike.

games.title: CrossCode
games.description: This retro-inspired 2D action RPG might outright surprise you. CrossCode combines 16-bit style graphics with butter-smooth physics, a fast-paced combat system, and engaging puzzle mechanics, served with a gripping sci-fi story. CrossCode is all about how it plays! Take the best out of two popular genres, find a good balance between them and make a great game. That’s what CrossCode does. You get the puzzles of old school Action Adventure dungeons and are rewarded with the great variety of equipment you know and love from RPGs. During the fast-paced battles you will use the tools you find on your journey to reveal and exploit the enemies’ weaknesses and at the same time will be able to choose equipment and skills for a more in-depth approach in fighting your enemies.

games.title: Lost Eidolons: Veil of the Witch
games.description: From the world of Lost Eidolons comes an all-new roguelite tactical RPG. Awake on a mysterious island of damned souls, where your only hope of survival lies in strategic combat. Choose your paths, allies, weapons, and skills wisely in your quest to recover what's lost, braving death time and again.Key FeaturesTactical Combat: Turn-based tactical action on the grid. Experience heart-pounding battles that require careful planning and quick reflexes.Roguelite Gameplay: Roguelite-fused gameplay loop where death is a stepping stone to greater power. Persistent upgrades ensure progress between runs, making each expedition more challenging and rewarding.Dynamic Encounters: Choice-driven random encounters that introduce unexpected twists and turns, impacting the outcome of battles.Diverse Characters: Eight ally characters to unlock. Build a formidable expedition party. Each character brings unique abilities and weapon proficiency.Progression System: Hundreds of random session-based skill upgrades and dozens of random persistent upgrades to customize and strengthen the party.Standalone Narrative: Standalone story set in the world of Lost Eidolons, offering a fresh narrative experience.

games.title: Terraforming Mars
games.description: Companies are competing with ingenuity to transform Mars into a habitable planet. Each spends numerous resources and uses innovative technologies to raise the temperature, create a breathable atmosphere, and make the oceans liquid. As terraforming progresses, more and more people will come to settle on the Red Planet from Earth.In Terraforming Mars, you lead a corporation with unique characteristics. Play Project cards, enhance production, place your cities and green spaces on the map, and compete for rewards and objectives.Reach a high level of Terraforming by increasing the temperature, raising the oxygen level, or creating oceans. Make the planet habitable for future generations!Earn Victory Points by building cities, infrastructures, and other increasingly ambitious projects.Beware: rival corporations will try to slow your progress. That's a beautiful forest you've planted there... It would be a real shame if an asteroid were to suddenly crash into it, don't you think?

games.title: Please, Touch the Artwork
games.description: There are 160 paintings to touch (3-4 hours of gameplay) spread over 3 unique games.The 1st game tells the origin story of pure abstract art. It's a challenging puzzle where you'll add colors and lines to a canvas to recreate abstract paintings.In the 2nd game you'll move to a big city, only to be overwhelmed with mixed emotions. Explore the maze of New York City while collecting words from a poem.In the 3rd game you'll help Boogie and Woogie, 2 squares who just want to be together, by figuring out how obstacles influence Woogie's path, in a complex growing society.

games.title: Between Time: Escape Room
games.description: You are going to travel through time to steal priceless treasures. Will you be able to make it back alive?Between Time is an escape room that will test your skills. Travel through time, explore mysterious places around the planet, solve puzzles, decode secret codes, and find hidden objects and treasures.Characteristics:Solve puzzles based on logic.Explore five rooms set at different times in human history.Discover more about A.I.T.M.A, the Artificial Intelligence Time Machine Assistant.

games.title: Sugardew Island
games.description: Run your own farm shop, without any pressure!Sugardew Island is an intentionally uncomplicated cozy farm shop sim, crafted by a tiny indie dev team. We developed Sugardew Island so you can unwind, relax, and enjoy your beloved genre.Take care of your animals and your farm, sell your goods to the cute Forest Folk, upgrade your farm, and fulfill small orders from the Harmony Tree to fill the tiny island with life again.Inspired by the beloved Nintendo© DS Harvest Moon games, Sugardew Island is our love letter to the genre, with around 15 hours of delightful gameplay.Run your own cozy farm shop and sell goodsCare for animals and build bondsGrow crops and gather resourcesComplete Harmony Tree quests to restore the islandRelaxing, pressure-free gameplay with no time limitsAlso designed for short, enjoyable play sessions

games.title: Space Grunts 2
games.description: Get ready for endless space missions where no two runs are the same! Space Grunts 2 smashes roguelike exploration with tactical deck-building.Your adventure starts with a unique, procedurally generated level. As you explore, every item you grab - be it a weapon, a shield, or a gadget - becomes a card in your deck. You build your strategy on the fly, deciding what gear to keep and what to leave behind.When an alien threat appears, it's time for a swift, turn-based card battle. Choose your best move and watch the action unfold. Every choice matters, because one wrong step could mean mission failure.Complete challenges to unlock powerful Trinkets and Buff cards, giving you a permanent edge in future runs. With new paths, random events, and endless variations, you'll never have a dull moment. Can you build the perfect deck to survive the alien hordes?

games.title: Wargame Construction Set III: Age of Rifles 1846-1905
games.description: Master the art of war in a world where the rifle is the king! Age of Rifles puts you in command of troops from around the world, fighting the endless battles that raged between 1846 and 1905. Much more than an American Civil War game, Age of Rifles includes the battles of Europe, Asia, and South America. Every major conflict is yours to control!Key features:Easy-to-use game interface allows the novice player to take command immediately.Create your own scenarios and campaigns with the comprehensive Game Editor! Choose from over 1,000 uniform combinations, 80+ weapons, and 28 nationalities to create your dream battle.Unique gunshot, explosion, and fire animations bring the battlefield to life as your troops advance.Campaigns and scenarios can be played from either side as stand-alone, two player, or email games.Unparalleled computer opponent AI.The Gazetteer encyclopedia contains complete historical background on individual encounters, wars, and weapons.Beautiful, painstakingly rendered units and icons and an original period soundtrack.Includes 8 campaigns and 62 scenarios:American Civil War/EastAmerican Civil War/WestAmerican Civil War/FullAustro-Prussian: Six Weeks WarFranco-Prussian WarMexican-American WarRusso-Japanese WarSoldier QueenCampaign expansion adds 3 campaigns and 30 scenarios:British Colonial Indian MutinyWars of Italian UnificationHood's Drive North

games.title: G.I. JOE: Wrath of Cobra
games.description: Cobra returns with its most fiendish plot yet, and it's up to G.I. JOE to stop them! G.I. JOE: Wrath of Cobra is a retro side-scrolling beat 'em up inspired by the iconic 1980s era. Choose from legendary heroes like Duke, Scarlett, Roadblock, and Snake Eyes, each with unique moves and abilities, and battle through hordes of Cobra forces.Take down classic villains including Destro, Baroness, Serpentor, and Cobra Commander. Fight up close with combos and special moves or use a variety of weapons to control the battlefield.Key Features:Play as iconic G.I. JOE heroes with unique abilitiesBattle classic Cobra villains and enemy typesRetro beat 'em up gameplay with modern polishLocal multiplayer for co-op actionPixel art visuals and a retro-inspired soundtrack

games.title: Tested on Humans: Escape Room
games.description: You are the test subject. Will you be able to discover what the experiments are about and escape?Tested on Humans is an escape room in a dark setting that will test your skills. Solve this mystery by exploring each of the rooms in which this adventure takes place.Characteristics:Solve puzzles based on logic.Explore different rooms. Find clues and hidden objects.Discover more about the experiments and your past.Enjoy the dark and atmospheric setting.

games.title: Sin Slayers: Reign of The 8th
games.description: Seven Deadly Sins. Have you heard about the 8th? Sin Slayers: Reign of The 8th is a challenging turn-based RPG roguelite where you decide the fate of the world while taking its sins upon yourself.Navigate the Sinometer: the more sinful actions you perform, the more riches you recover - but the world notices, unleashing horrendous creatures until the Sin Lord himself emerges.Build your party of Lost Souls - knights, rogues, witches, and nuns - each bearing their own burden. Gear up, train, and lead them into monster-filled plains cursed by your choices.Each enemy is a manifestation of Evil, yet every one has a weakness. Learn, adapt, and face the ultimate challenge: the Sin Lords, walking embodiments of Cardinal Sins.

games.title: Paradise Killer
games.description: Paradise Island. A synthetic rock floating on an ocean in another reality filled with lunatics, psychopaths, and a thousand secrets. Each island fails and a new one is born. On a dark night during the 24th Island Sequence, Paradise is killed.The surreal Paradise Island is home to the Syndicate, immortal worshipers of dead alien gods. The player assumes the role of Lady Love Dies, an exiled investigator brought back to solve the mass murder of the Syndicate's Council. Using Starlight, her investigation assistant computer, Lady Love Dies will scour Paradise Island for clues in her quest for justice. Will she find a single culprit or unravel a conspiracy centuries in the making?Paradise Killer is a free-form, open world, first-person exploration investigation game. The player investigates the mass murder of the island's ruling council as they wish, piecing together clues and forming their own arguments to present in the end trial. By choosing how to interrogate suspects and finding evidence in any order, the player will discover not a singular truth but a truth they shape and craft. Find your truth and breathe life back into Paradise.

games.title: XCOM: Chimera Squad
games.description: XCOM: Chimera Squad delivers an all-new story and turn-based tactical combat experience in the XCOM universe.After years of alien rule, humanity won the war for Earth. But when the Overlords fled the planet, they left their former soldiers behind. Now, five years after the events of XCOM 2, humans and aliens are working together to forge a civilization of cooperation and coexistence.Welcome to City 31, a model of peace in a post-invasion world. However, not all of Earth's inhabitants support interspecies alliance. Chimera Squad, an elite force of human and alien agents, must work together to destroy the underground threats driving the city toward chaos.Your agents are unique: each is equipped with special tactical abilities and driven by a different motivation for joining Chimera Squad. Deploy targeted team members to investigate and combat the dangers that pervade the districts of City 31. Lead Chimera Squad through a new experience that innovates on XCOM's turn-based legacy, utilizing strategy, teamwork, and new breach-and-clear gameplay to complete your mission objectives.The future of City 31 depends on you.

games.title: Play Dispatch | Amazon Luna - No Download Required
games.description: Free with Prime Gaming via Amazon Luna.

games.title: Play EA SPORTS FC™ 26 | Amazon Luna - No Download Required
games.description: Free with Prime Gaming via Amazon Luna.

games.title: Use PhonesAs Controllers
games.description: All rise for Judge Arnold Schwarzenegger—Courtroom Chaos is now in session!Courtroom Chaos is the uproarious AI-powered party game that turns you and your friends into the stars of the most absurd courtroom in history. With the legendary AI Judge Arnold Schwarzenegger presiding over the bench, you'll improvise wild testimony, craft ridiculous characters, and argue the unwinnable. All while the Judge fires back with questions, reactions, and his final, unforgettable verdict. But don't let the laughs fool you, this Judge doesn't pull punches. One wrong answer and you might find yourself on the receiving end of an action hero-sized verbal takedown. Arnold's not here to coddle you, he's here to terminate weak arguments.The cases? Completely made up. The laughter? Absolutely genuine. The Judge’s strength? Very, very real.No game console. No scripts. No mercy. Just your voice, your creativity, and whatever madness you bring to the bench, assuming you can survive Arnold's cross-examination.• The Formidable Judge Arnold Schwarzenegger Presiding: - Arnold lends his voice, looks, and personality to the generative AI bench to hear your testimony, ask questions, try the case, and render the verdict.• Voice-Driven Improv Gameplay: - Use your voice and your creativity to invent characters, concoct your story, and try to manipulate the case in your favor.• Choose your Play Style: - With 4 ways to play, there’s something for everyone. - Standard Court: Judge Arnold takes his court seriously, delivering verdicts on multiplayer cases​. - Action Court: The perennial action hero brings explosive scenarios​ and interactions to this mode. Buckle up! - Settle a Bet: Bring your heated, head-to-head debates to the bench and solve them once and for all. - Solo Judgment: In this single-player mode argue your case one-on-one with Judge Arnold.• Unscripted, Replayable Fun: - No two cases are the same. The game reacts to what you say; AI-generated responses and outcomes make each session unique.• Built for GameNight: - Cloud-based gameplay designed for local solo and multiplayer (1–6 players). No download required means it’s fast to set up and easy for anyone to jump into and play. • No Controllers Needed: - All you need is your TV, your phone, and your friends. Use your voice and your phone to speak your piece, deliver your lines, and let the Generative AI take it from there. ADDITIONAL DETAILS:• As a Luna Standard or Luna Premium subscriber, you will receive 10 non-stacking cases to play every day. Each case is an individual game session or unique subject you bring before Judge Arnold. If you consume your daily allotment of 10 cases in a given day and don’t want to wait for them to refill the next day, you can purchase additional cases through the in-game prompt.• Purchased cases are consumed before cases included with Luna Prime or Luna Premium and carry over if unused.• Daily cases included with Luna Standard or Luna Premium do not stack or carry over if unused. Maximum of 10 cases included each day. • The number of daily cases included with Luna Standard and Luna Premium is subject to change. Daily cases refill at 12:00 AM UTC.• Judge Arnold only understands and responds in English. Learn more about AI in this game: https://www.amazongamestudios.com/about-ai©/™ 2026, Amazon.com, Inc., its affiliates, and/or licensors. Developed by Amber Studio and published by Amazon Game Studios. All rights reserved. This game includes AI-generated content for your personal entertainment purposes only. Cases are fictitious and created through player input. The name, likeness, and other attributes of Arnold Schwarzenegger reproduced in this game are trademarks or intellectual property of Oak Productions and/or Arnold Schwarzenegger, and used under license.• Terms of Use: www.amazon.com/help/ags/terms• Privacy: www.amazon.com/help/ags/privacy• Code of Conduct; www.amazon.com/help/ags/coc• Legal Notices - http://www.amazon.com/help/ags/notices/courtroomchaos• Report Problem - https://www.amazongamestudios.com/courtroom-chaos-problem• Support Page - https://help.courtroomchaos.com/

games.title: Play Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy | Amazon Luna - No Download Required
games.description: Fire up a wild ride across the cosmos with a fresh take on Marvel’s Guardians of the Galaxy. In this action-adventure game, you are Star-Lord leading the unpredictable Guardians from one explosion of chaos to the next. You got this. Probably.LEAD THE GUARDIANS OF THE GALAXYYou play as Star-Lord, so nothing’s off-limits with your bold combat style, from Element Blasters and jet boot-powered dropkicks to tag-team beat-downs. With the Guardians fighting at your side, call the shots and overwhelm your opponents with signature attacks. Meanwhile, the consequences of your decisions will range from light-hearted to downright unexpected as your journey unfolds. ALL-NEW STORYYour newly-formed band of legendary misfits is set to save the universe in this fresh but faithful take on the Guardians of the Galaxy. Somehow, you set off a chain of catastrophic events, leading to a wild ride through mind-blowing worlds inhabited by iconic and original Marvel characters. Turn up the all-star ‘80s mixtape and get ready to kick it. FROM MISFITS TO SUPER HEROESYou’re the only thing holding the unpredictable Guardians together, so you’ll have to get better at this leadership thing fast. With this offbeat approximation of a family at your side, there will be tears and laughter as you set about tearing into the cosmos together. Whatever’s waiting around the next corner, you know it’s going to be a blast.© 2026 MARVEL. Developed by Eidos Montréal. EIDOS and EIDOS MONTRÉAL logo are registered trademarks or trademarks of the Eidos Interactive Corporation group of companies.

games.title: Use PhonesAs Controllers
games.description: Test your general knowledge and reasoning skills in “Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?”, the official video game of the show!Experience the suspense of the famous TV show in the official video game Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?Climb the prize ladder by answering 15 increasingly difficult questions. Is that your final answer?

games.description: Free with Prime Gaming via Amazon Luna.

games.title: Play Alien: Isolation | Amazon Luna - No Download Required
games.description: HOW WILL YOU SURVIVE?Discover the true meaning of fear in Alien: Isolation, a survival horror set in an atmosphere of constant dread and mortal danger. Fifteen years after the events of Alien™, Ellen Ripley’s daughter, Amanda enters a desperate battle for survival, on a mission to unravel the truth behind her mother's disappearance.Overcome an ever-present deadly threat – Experience persistent fear as a truly dynamic and reactive Alien uses its senses to hunt you down and respond to your every move.Improvise to survive – Hack systems, scavenge for vital resources and craft items to deal with each situation. Will you evade your enemies, distract them or face them head on?Explore a world of mystery and betrayal – Immerse yourself in the detailed setting of Sevastopol, a decommissioned trading station on the fringes of space. Encounter a rich cast of inhabitants in a world scarred by fear and mistrust.

games.title: CyClones
games.description: No, this isn't about twisters that take out trailer parks in the Midwest. We're referring to Cybernetic Clones, deadly creations of an alien race bent on Earth's conquest.To add insult to injury, these CyClones are actually captured human beings transformed into flesh-steel monstrosities! As Earth's defender armed to the teeth with the highest of hi-tech weaponry, you're dying to jump into action.CyClones is a white-hot multi-media explosion from the 90s! It features everything that was cool at that time - full-motion videos, cinematics, digitized voices, sizzling sound effects, and breath-taking music. Smooth scrolling, head-on perspective puts all the action right where you want it - in your face.A streamlined interface allows for quick access to weapons and inventory - gameplay is fast and fun!Features intense full-motion video and cinematics from the 90s plus smooth scrolling and first-person perspective.Digitized voices, sound effects, and original music bring the action to life!Multiple missions with variable difficulty settings give players of all experience levels a fair shot at CyClones.

games.title: LONESTAR
games.description: LONESTAR is a strategic roguelike spaceship deckbuilder. As a bounty hunter, you will capture criminals scattered across the universe. Win the shockwave battle to gain rewards and vacations. Find treasures, customize spaceships, unlock talents, defeat felons, and be a legend!Unique Shockwave BattleBoth sides accumulate Power for their own spaceship and compete in a fair shockwave battle to determine who the winner is. This is the recognized way of battle in the LONESTAR universe, without any surprise attacks.Free SpaceshipsAll hunters who join the Association will receive a free spaceship! Currently, the Association has two different spaceships to choose from - the third spaceship is under urgent development and will be deployed soon. Each spaceship has its own expertise and possesses nearly a hundred exclusive units.Numerous PilotsAs the largest bounty hunter organization in the LONESTAR universe, the Association has dozens of spaceship pilots. Each pilot has unique exclusive skills and a vast array of random talents, ensuring that each hunting experience is unique.Generous Vacation TimeThe Association strictly adheres to the LONESTAR Universe Labor Protection Act and provides generous vacations for all Bounty Hunters. Every time you complete a Bounty Mission, the Association offers a period of paid leave. During your vacation, you will encounter various unique events, make choices, and obtain resources.Know the Enemy and Know YourselfThe Association's Intelligence Center has gathered information on nearly a hundred wanted criminals in the LONESTAR universe, including 15 extremely dangerous boss-level felons! You can access the criminal information before each mission and adjust your combat strategies accordingly.

games.title: Symphony of War: The Nephilim Saga
games.description: At the turn of the millennium, the world of Tahnra is headed for a reckoning. A long and bloody conflict left the Empire of Veridia scarred. Now a rogue general has abducted the Empress and raised the flag of rebellion. You, a young academy graduate, will command an expedition that sets off a chain of events to shake the very foundations of the world.Symphony of War is a 2D turn-based strategy RPG with a story-rich 30-40 hour campaign, 50+ character classes, and massive tactical depth. Maneuver squads of up to 9 soldiers across battlefields, grab high ground, hold chokepoints, ambush from the woods, and break the enemy's morale. Outfit your troops with equipment and artifacts, research upgrades through the tech tree, and forge unbreakable bonds with heroes from across the world. Tactics win engagements. Logistics win wars.

games.title: Space Grunts: Chrono Shard
games.description: Master time. Stop the Ooze. Outsmart a galactic infection in this high-speed, turn-based roguelike. Use your Chrono Shard to loop the timeline, leaving gear and upgrades for your future self. Craft your arsenal, evolve your skills into elite sub-classes, and turn every death into an advantage.Space Grunts: Chrono Shard is a high-octane blend of tactical depth and arcade energy. With the power of the Chrono Shard, you don’t just survive the void, you master it.The Chrono LoopUse your Shard to rewind the clock. Any items you’ve placed or changes you’ve made to the environment stay exactly where they are for your next attempt.Rapid-Fire StrategyFast-paced, turn-based combat rewards quick thinking and even quicker trigger fingers.Engaging Crafting SystemFind crafting stations to disassemble loot, scavenge resources, and upgrade your weapons into unstoppable tools of destruction.Evolutionary Skill TreesInvest in three core skill types to unlock specialized sub-classes. Whether you become a Sniper, Assassin, Hitman, Hardened, Elite, Engineer, Gadget, Gearhead, or Veteran, your build defines your edge.Deep Space HazardsDeploy into procedurally generated space stations and moon bases. Every mission is a new layout of mysterious sectors and deadly surprises.Secure the GatesA sentient Ooze is devouring the galaxy, jumping through a hijacked network of HyperGates. As part of the Space Grunts’ elite tactical unit, you are dropped into “time bubbles” to shut down the gates and contain the spread. Loop the timeline, evolve your grunt, and stop the Ooze - at any cost.Key features:Persistent Time-Loops: Carry over items and environmental changes between runs.Elite Sub-Classes: Level up your skills to unlock unique benefits.Advanced Crafting: Create, upgrade, and scrap gear at specialized stations.Signature Fast-Paced Gameplay: The classic Space Grunts arcade feel in a turn-based format.
